steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtracting the second parentheses changes the sign of each term inside them.
$$(7x^3-2)-(-5x^3+9)=7x^3-2+5x^3-9$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Combine the $x^3$ terms and the constant terms.
$$(7x^3+5x^3)+(-2-9)=12x^3-11$$
This matches $bx^3-11$, so $b=12$. The answer is 12.
